parameters.name: horzsource
parameters.label: Horizontal Source
parameters.description: Select which of the second input's channels to use for the horizontal warp of the first input.

parameters.name: vertsource
parameters.label: Vertical Source
parameters.description: Select which of the second input's channels to use for the vertical warp of the first input.

parameters.name: fliphorz
parameters.label: Flip Horizontal Direction
parameters.description: Reverses the direction of the horizontal warp. A pixel value of 0 for the horizontal warp will mean that it fetches a pixel from the right most column of the first input.

parameters.name: flipvert
parameters.label: Flip Vertical Direction
parameters.description: Reverses the direction of the vertical warp. A pixel value of 0 for the vertical warp will mean that it fetches a pixel from the top most row of the first input.

parameters.name: extend
parameters.label: Extend
parameters.description: Controls what is returned from your first input when the second input's values are outside the [0-1] range.

parameters.name: interp
parameters.label: Interpolation
parameters.description: Select which interpolation method to apply when sampling the first input.
